slices.title: Disable Flyway clean-on-validation-error in production
slices.jtbd: When configuring the application database migrations, I want to disable spring.flyway.clean-on-validation-error, so that we prevent catastrophic data loss in production environments caused by silent schema drops.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given a production environment setup, When Flyway encounters a validation error, Then it must not drop and recreate the schema.
Given the application configuration files, When we inspect application.properties or equivalent, Then spring.flyway.clean-on-validation-error must either be missing or set to false.
slices.sixSigmaMetric: decrease risky database recreation events to 0
